stemHtml: An aircraft is used for Commercial Air Transport. Since the aircraft's initial entry into service, 3 years ago, several repairs and modifications have been executed. These changes were accurately documented. The Operator uses individual aircraft masses. Does the aircraft need to be re-weighed now?

options.a: No, but it must be re-weighed within the next 6 years.
options.b: No, but it must be re-weighed within the next 12 months.
options.c: Yes, because the applicable EU regulation requires a re-weighing every 3 years.
options.d: Yes, because re-weighting should be done after every repair and/or modification.
